examples.output: Availability across time zones; not overwhelming volunteers; meeting minimum coordination needs for the pilot period. One member felt fortnightly was still too frequent for their schedule.

aiGuidance.extraction: Look for statements about what matters most, explicit trade-offs named, objections raised, and any disagreement about the decision or its criteria. Extract both the criteria used and any tension between them.
aiGuidance.purpose: Captures the judging criteria, trade-offs acknowledged, and any recorded disagreement that shaped how the alternatives were evaluated.

description: The standards, values, constraints, and trade-offs used to evaluate options.
name: key_requirements
